rationale: The cited paper appears as part of a grouped citation when the authors note that online reviews can exhibit sequential and temporal dynamics. In that passage, the citing paper mainly uses the group of prior studies as broad background justification for including timing/order controls, with no distinct discussion of this specific paper's model, findings, or mechanisms. The core identification strategy, hypotheses about manager responses, and main empirical contribution are developed independently of a direct build on Moe and Trusov (2011).
